name: Valuence Holdings Inc.
summary: Valuence Holdings Inc. engages in the purchase, auction, and sale of reusable products. It provides branded goods, antiques, precious metals, and other products. The company offers its products through stores and online in Japan. It also engages in real estate brokerage, app and systems development, and other related businesses. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
